headline: Smurfit Westrock Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Smurfit Westrock (NYSE:SW) reported first-quarter results that management described as “solid” and largely in line with internal plans, despite weather-related disruptions and downtime that weighed on performance. President and CEO Anthony Smurfit said the company generated adjusted EBITDA of $1.076
